entry.title: Re: How do I automate creation of 'Cloud Integration' Cap...
entry.content:
Hi @Kriba ,

I don't think that currently you can achieve more than you've described. As I ran into the same issue when trying with my  integration_suite.tf example I've created this influencing request:

Allow activation of SAP Integration Suite capabilities using Terraform (S-User required)

please vote!

Best regards,
Gregor

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition - New Features released for July 10th
entry.content:
Hi @Yogananda ,

regarding the topic "HTML Business Solutions without Destinations" it would be great if:

  • Manage Products sample project 
  • Developing HTML5 Business Solutions as Content Providers documentation

would also get updated and demonstrate this option.

Best regards,
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Come join us for the SAP TechEd Community Cluetrain 2025 edition
entry.content:
Hi @AnnePetteroe  and @rofinke ,

already any location planned for the Stammtisch?

Best regards,
Gregor

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 app multitenant app - standalone approuter
entry.content: Check out the blog post Cloud-Native Lab #4 – Multi-tenant Web Apps in SAP BTP

entry.title: Re: How to access Cloud Foundry Controller API?
entry.content:
Hi @marco_spyker ,

thank you for posting this follow up. I also wondered if there is a way to authenticate to the Cloud Foundry API using X.509 Client Certificates. And with the help of the Blog Post:

Automation with the btp and cf command-line interfaces: logging in with passcodes

I made it work and used the passcode retrieved from the Cloud Identity Service Endpoint "/service/users/passcode" instead of the Password (cf_password .env Variable) in my Example:

https://github.com/gregorwolf/bookshop-demo/blob/main/tests/cloud-foundry.http

With the following destination I'm able to retrieve the passcode:

I think I will build a CAP Plugin that uses this destination plus a destination to the CF API to simplify the access.

Best regars,
Gregor

entry.title: Re: How to Integrate SAP BTP Cloud Logging Service with SAP Cloud Identity Services (IAS) Using SAML
entry.content:
Hi @shusei_sekiya ,

thank you for this blog post. It filled the missing gaps of the official documentation at Integrate SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication SAML 2.0 with SAP Cloud Logging. It would be great if the documentation can be improved and especially the SAML Configuration Template be corrected (surrounding curly brackets) so that everyone can directly follow the official documentation when setting up SSO to SAP Cloud Logging.

I hope that in future the integration to SAP Cloud Identity Services will come just out of the box as it is already done for example for SAP Build Work Zone.

Best regards,
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Strategy Adobe Forms On-Premise
entry.content:
Hi @peterbarker and @sandra_thimme ,

since the annoucement of ADS on XSA it's almost two years now. Is the project still on schedule? When will SAP ship a first version or at least provide a timeline?

Best regards,
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Introducing Application Vulnerability Report for Cloudfoundry Applications – Try It Now!
entry.content:
Hi @Yogananda ,

thank you for providing this service in it's Beta version for testing.

I've activated it in an EU10 Subaccount and got my first scan results on January 7th 2026. For the application cap-rfc I've got 5 findings . Due to the findings I've updated the dependencies of the application and re-deployed. As I understand your previous response a new scan is triggered every week or after a new deployment. But when I checked the API today, I still have 5 findings. The Field lastFound shows me:
"lastFound": "2025-12-31T12:12:00.799Z",
for all 5 entries.

Looking forward for your input.

Best regards,
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Using CDS views in ABAP code - Part 1 (data selection)
entry.content:
Hi @jeffrey_towell2 ,

it is worth to mention that in in newer releases the path expressions can also be used for fields coming from associations. Please check the example in the documentation: ABAP SQL - SQL Path Expressions sql_path .

CU
Gregor

entry.title: Re: WebSocket RFC – RFC For the Internet
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

please support my Influencing Request:

Add support for Websocket RFC to @sap/cds-rfc and @sap-rfc/node-rfc-library 

Best regards,
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Deployments without passwords with SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery
entry.content:
Hi @holger_partsch ,

thank you for this blog post. An additional tip when two factor authentication (TOTP) is activated in SAP Cloud Identity Services (CIS)/ Identity Authtentication Service (IAS). I had to configure the Risk-Based Authentication for the Application "SAP Business Technology Platform" with this rule that checks for a Group Membership:

I've tried also rules checking the Authentication Method for Client Certificate and Token but that didn't work. In the logs of the CI/CD service I saw that the endpoint:

/service/users/passcode

of the SAP Cloud Identity Service is used to get a passcode. Maybe someone knows what Authentication Method needs to be choosen in the Risk-Based Authentication rules?

Best regards,
Gregor

entry.title: Re: No active outbound service for appl. obj. 50000000262...
entry.content:
Hi @GeovanaLettnin ,

thank you for this answer. I ran into the same issue in our new S/4HANA Public Cloud Test inscance (after 3SL conversion) during the setup of EDI communication. But can you explain why in our production system for the same process no business partners are maintained in the communication system?

Best regards,
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Issue with AI160 JavaScript Exercise – /api/agent/trigger-agent returning HTML instead of JSON
entry.content: Have you tried the request to the Generative AI Hub endpoint with CURL or REST Client? Does it behave the same way?

entry.title: Re: Managing Themes Across SAP Environments
entry.content:
Hi @barbara_hartel ,

I would suggest that you link to the Blog post from @andreas-roessler who provides the details how a Theme can be transported between Subaccounts using the SAP Content Agent Service: Effortlessly Sharing Themes Across Your SAP BTP Cloud Foundry Environments.

Best regards,
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Effortlessly Sharing Themes Across Your SAP BTP Cloud Foundry Environments
entry.content:
Hi @andreas-roessler ,

I can't agree with the "well-explaine" in the documentation. I just had to setup SAP Content Agent Service and unfortunately it's a lot of try and error. I haven't found any mentioining of the Content Type that needs to be configured in the Transport Node. The correct one is "Multi-Target Application". Also I would suggest that you re-draw the picture in this post and increase the Subaccount box also arround Theming and CAS. The CAS Instance must be subscribed in the Subaccount where the Theme Designer is used. And the same needs to be applied for the Target Landscape where not only CAS needs to be subscribed but also an instance of the CAS with the Plan: application must be created. The service Key of this instance must be used to create the destination in the cTMS Subaccount.

Best regards,
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Introducing Application Vulnerability Report for Cloudfoundry Applications – Try It Now!
entry.content:
Hi @Yogananda ,

just noticed that with the latest update the Application Vulnerability Report has now also it's own UI. But unfortunately this causes an issue in the SAP Build Work Zone Content Expolorer. I've filed SAP Support Case 564722/2026. Hope you can directly pick it up and provide a solution. It's currently blocking us from adding new content to the Launchpad.

Best regards,
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Blog#1: Finally it is here - How "pony" brings custom fields to SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi @PClaus ,

great to see what you've achievied:

  • Custom Tile in the SAP Cloud ALM Launchpad
  • Extending SAP CALM Objects with Custom Fields
  • Integrating this into the SAP CALM Standard Search

I've did a thorrow research but can't find any pointer in the SAP Documentation for CALM that describes how that is possible. Can you explain what official way you've used to achieve that? If it is not any official API how will you ensure that your extension works when SAP decides to change anything?

Best regards
Gregor

entry.title: Re: @sap/cds-rfc Plugin and XSTRING Handling
entry.content:
Please try:

if (payload.PICTURE) {
  const base64 = payload.PICTURE.includes(",")
    ? payload.PICTURE.split(",")[1]
    : payload.PICTURE;

  const base64Buffer = Buffer.from(base64, "base64");
  payload.PICTURE = base64Buffer.toString('binary');
}
payload.MATNR = "000004711";

entry.title: Re: How to consume a remote service with ETag (Precondition required)?
entry.content: Any update regarding the CQN Update support for remote entities that need the ETag / If-Match Header?

entry.title: Re: Hello React & Vue : SAP CAP’s New UI Layer is Here!
entry.content:
Hi @Yogananda ,

the initial bookshop demo application from @Daniel7 used Vue since it's initial version. So the actual new thing is that the cds add options vue and react where added? Or do I miss anything in addition?

Best regards,
Gregor
